text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: First place... I won! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All that training paid off, and I've gotten closer
to running the way I want!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...But I can't get complacent. I have to strive for
even more!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You should've said something if you were
standing there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You scared me! I guess I was so happy I didn't
even realize you were here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So, uh... How'd I do today?
choice_data_list: I could tell you ran your very best.
I think there's still room for improvement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So, uh... How'd I do today?
choice_data_list: I could tell you ran your very best.
I think there's still room for improvement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Really? I was feeling it myself, but now that I hear
someone else say it... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm going to keep this up for my next
race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you have even greater
expectations for me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I want to keep reaching for greater
heights too!
